product: Customer-managed VPC will soon be required for classic workspaces
tagline: In a future release, Databricks plans to deprecate classic workspace creation with a Databricks managed VPC.
what_it_does: In a future release, Databricks plans to deprecate classic workspace creation with a Databricks managed VPC. New classic workspaces will require a customer managed VPC. For the simplest quick start, use a serverless workspace.
why_it_matters: Compliance: Comply with specific cloud security and governance standards required by your organization.

capabilities.title: 443: for Databricks infrastructure, cloud
capabilities.desc: 443: for Databricks infrastructure, cloud data sources, and library repositories

capabilities.title: 53: for DNS resolution when
capabilities.desc: 53: for DNS resolution when you use custom DNS

capabilities.title: 6666: for secure cluster connectivity
capabilities.desc: 6666: for secure cluster connectivity. This is only required if you use PrivateLink.

key_takeaway: In a future release, Databricks plans to deprecate classic workspace creation with a Databricks managed VPC.
